meaning: n.性别,男性或女性,性欲,<口>性交,<俚>生殖器,阴茎vt.区别...的性别,引起...的性欲
examples: His voice oozed with sex appeal.
My sex life is my business.
He was very open in his attitudes about sex.
We believe that opening it up to same-sex couples will strengthen, not weaken, the institution.
The General Assembly will consider whether the church should ordain ministers who are in same-sex relationships.
